name: sqwebrpg-engine
description: SQwebRPG: a reusable Next.js framework for building multiplayer browser RPGs, PBBGs, and MUD-style games.

scripts.prisma:push: prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script --output prisma/init.sql && prisma db execute --file prisma/init.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.setup:demo: tsx scripts/reset-demo-db.ts && npm run prisma:push && npm run prisma:generate && tsx prisma/seed.ts
